name: Repo analysis loader evalset
description: ADK-native evalset for the analysis half (load_context -> structure_profile): given a public repo, the agent should fetch its real data with the right tools and produce a grounded profile. Run with `adk eval`.

parts.text: Repo Guardian is an agentic code reviewer built with Google ADK. It is primarily Python, with Terraform (HCL) deployment and Gherkin tests. It reviews diffs against a spec, runs a deterministic security pre-screen before the LLM, and returns one of four verdicts.
